title: Home and furniture
explanation:
Home and furniture

  • rooms: attic, basement, utility room, landing
  • furniture: wardrobe, chest of drawers, armchair, cushion, rug
  • verbs: furnish, decorate, renovate, tidy up

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I keep my clothes in the ____. | *wardrobe | rug | landing
We sat on the comfortable ____. | *armchair | attic | renovate
The ____ is upstairs between the bedrooms. | *landing | basement | cushion
We want to ____ the kitchen next year. | *renovate | furnish | tidy

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: We store old boxes in the ____. | attic
There's a nice ____ on the floor. | rug
We need to ____ the living room — new paint and pictures. | decorate
The washing machine is in the ____. | utility room
Put the books on the ____. | shelf

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Please ____ up your room before guests arrive. | *tidy | furnish | renovate
The ____ keeps the light out. | *curtain | cushion | attic
Our flat is fully ____. | *furnished | decorated | tidied
Socks are in the ____ in the bedroom. | *chest of drawers | basement | rug
